description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a mix of paved driveway, green lawn, and garden beds. The front facade features a garage on the left, a central wooden entry door with a small porch, and a large window to the right, all framed by white brick walls. The property is enclosed by a combination of wooden and red brick fencing, with a mature tree and landscaped greenery in the front yard. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a lawn and additional trees, while the sides are bordered by planters and privacy fencing. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large glass panels providing natural light to the interior spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a functional layout typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white brick exterior, garage, and landscaped front and back yards, enclosed by mixed fencing. Large windows and a central wooden entryway highlight its contemporary suburban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry door with porch, driveway, front lawn, and a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the length of the house, side garden, and privacy fencing with visible planters.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the backyard lawn, rear entry, and additional landscaping with planters and trees.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the wooden fencing, side planters, and the backyard area with a large tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a small porch, minimal steps, and decorative greenery, framed by clean brickwork and a paved approach.
